headline: First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. Announces Appointment of Ashlee Weisser to Chief Financial Officer
summary: CFO Ashlee Weisser First Watch announces the appointment of Ashlee Weisser to CFO BRADENTON, Fla., June 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: FWRG) (“First Watch” or the “Company”), the leading Daytime Dining concept serving breakfast, brunch and lunch, today announced the appointment of Ashlee Weisser to Chief Financial Officer effective June 8, 2026. She succeeds Mel Hope, who announced his planned retirement earlier this year and will continue to serve in an
